basic_details.job_title: CMC Vellore Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Medical Lab Technician, Junior Radiotherapy Technician And More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Medical Lab Technician, Junior Radiotherapy Technician, Junior Cardiac Technician
basic_details.short_information: hristian Medical College Vellore (CMC Vellore) Medical Lab Technician Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of CMC Vellore. Have been announced through the CMC Vellore Medical Lab Technician Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Medical Lab Technician (Term Appointment): Below 30 years Jr. Radiotherapy Technician (Term Appointment): Below 30 years Jr. Cardiac Technician (Term Appointment): Below 30 years

qualification.details: Medical Lab Technician (Term Appointment): H.Sc., with 2 Year Diploma in Medical Lab. Technician recognized by the CMAI or from the recognized University with one year experience in Clinical Biochemistry Laboratory. Jr. Radiotherapy Technician (Term Appointment): B.Sc. in Radiotherapy Technology from any recognized University (Registered in ELORA from AERB, Mumbai). Jr. Cardiac Technician (Term Appointment): B.Sc., in Cardiac Technology or B.Sc., (Sciences Subject) with PG Diploma in Cardiac Technology.

salary_details.details: Consolidated Salary as per institutional rules.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CMC Vellore Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 11-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CMC Vellore to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CMC Vellore recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the CMC Vellore recruitment is 11-05-2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the different posts available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for the posts of Medical Lab Technician (Term Appointment), Jr. Radiotherapy Technician (Term Appointment), and Jr. Cardiac Technician (Term Appointment).

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Medical Lab Technician post?
faq.answer: For the Medical Lab Technician post, candidates need H.Sc. with a 2-Year Diploma in Medical Lab. Technician and one year of experience in a Clinical Biochemistry Laboratory.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any age limit for these positions?
faq.answer: Yes, the age limit for all the mentioned posts is below 30 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Online. Candidates are advised to apply through the official CMC Vellore website.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is Contractual, referred to as Term Appointment.

faq.question: Q7. Where is CMC Vellore located?
faq.answer: Christian Medical College Vellore is located in Vellore, Tamil Nadu.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary structure for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The salary will be a consolidated salary as per the institutional rules of CMC Vellore.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any specific requirements for the Jr. Radiotherapy Technician post?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates applying for the Jr. Radiotherapy Technician post must have a B.Sc. in Radiotherapy Technology and be registered in ELORA from AERB, Mumbai.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates apply through private or correspondence modes?
faq.answer: No, only regular mode applications will be accepted. Private or correspondence applications will not be considered.
